reviews.review_description: Ron Anderson is possibly the most sought after vocal coach alive for the most famous mainstream singers and bands. Getting access to his teaching and technique style is not only already priceless, but to be taught with this innovative and creative system is really quite revolutionary. Awesome.
I enjoy this way to approach singing.  I can see how the human body is working.  And I have a clear understanding of the technique.

reviews.review_title: This App will be a Revolution !
reviews.review_description: The Knowledge of Ron Anderson to be a pro singer for everyone is amazing! Without a doubt this app will be a revolution!

The Ron Anderson method, Voixtek, seems incredible, with only a few days of practice I already feel the difference, I think the VR is awesome because I feel more immersed and can understand more deeply how the body works in each exercise. Thanks for sharing this wonderful technique

This is nothing more than a commercial, to promote a VR based vocal training system. This system may be awesome, I don't know. But you don't get to try it in any way whatsoever. You are just watching a COMMERCIAL for it, then if you want to try it, you need to join for a membership that's either 10, 50, or 100 bucks a month. You can get a free 7 day trial though, and that's great, but this has no entertainment value in of itself, and a very strange idea to put it in the store, as it's just an ad

developer_response.body:
We are very sorry you missed the opportunity to experience what Voixtek is all about. We encourage you to visit again and try pushing our GUEST button on our welcome screen. Please check if either your OculusGo or GearVR devices are up to date and by pressing the OculusGo controller’s back button you can skip at any time your journey through the descriptive experience of the product which is only meant for the users to understand our vision and why is so beneficial for your voice, body, and mind. 

The preface you refer to as a commercial is for all new users to be able to understand what the application is about. Is a detailed introduction to a new educational entertainment singing training system which is now available in both VR and mobile platforms. This system is for the curious singer, the professional singer and for anyone with musical interests who wants to understand the steps all major stars use to save their voices and understand vocal development further.  If you are interested in learning how to master your best voice in a FUN AND PRODUCTIVE way, and also having a wonderful time meditating, while training, VoixtekVR is the right platform for you. We invite you to visit our website and learn more about our history so that you can understand the purpose and the prospect of Voixtek's mission. 

It becomes very entertaining if you are in the pursuit of learning how to master your vocal instrument for any industry where Voice, Body, and Mind must all work together to create a better voice to sing well. Yours. 

Warmly,

The VoixtekVR team

reviews.review_description: I had this on oculus go until it broke 😔 Can I transfer this to the quest 2 I recently bought?

I am not a person who goes out and sings but it's something I love to do. Music has been a major part of my life since I was born. This application it’s crazy good. takes what I love to do as a hobby and helps me hone in on it, helps me control how I use it. I recommend this for every person that just wants to learn how to sing or to practice.

developer_response.body: Thank you! If music is such a big part of your life, then you're in the right place. Sing well!

reviews.review_description:
If you think like athletes do and you want to be trained to be a champion and have a championship coaching system well voixtek is for you.


Magnificent VR experience for the voice gamer and anybody finding about how our voice is a essential sound. I recommend a peak at what they do and you might be surprised how upscale the app is. For a beginner or a expert its all packaged for your needs to experience the power of you through your voice and much more.
Is the first time I tried a voice training system and the VR really helps to know what I need to do with my breathing

developer_response.body: Thank you for your review. We hope you are enjoying your practice. If you visit www.voixtek.com you can find how to learn all the tips and tricks real stars use to help not only the breathing but the overall shape of their voice.
